meta.setting: Company stores, supply counters, mine roads, and credit ledgers around French Gulch
meta.rdr_clone_target: RDR-clone western with debt, supplies, company pressure, reputation, and hard choices

research_grounding.title: California State Parks Shasta State Historic Park
research_grounding.use: Northern California mining commerce, merchandise, courthouse records, and store-town texture.

research_grounding.title: NPS Whiskeytown History and Culture
research_grounding.use: Mining communities, immigrant settlement, logging, ranching, and regional work pressure.

generation_prompt.task: Generate the Company Store Clerks cast page for the 1899 Jefferson State western packet. This JSON contains shape and guidance only.
page_shape: square image reference immediately after the title
opening blockquote with invented account note, counter warning, or credit saying generated later
H2 archetype subtitle in the register of Ledger Counter Men and Women
one or two compact lore paragraphs introducing clerks who extend credit, hide shortages, sell tools, and turn poverty into arithmetic
H3 Role with a short table-facing function phrase
H3 Traits with two to four terse signs or habits
10 H4 headings, each followed later by a brief playable move, leverage, cost, edge, or complication
H3 Camp Say closing blockquote with plain meaning generated later
generation_guidance: Generate clerks as dangerous because they remember numbers, favors, substitutions, and who came in scared.
Tie future moves to credit, price gouging, false shortages, account forgiveness, supply clues, ration substitution, gossip, and quiet sabotage.
Make the store a social hub where miners, ranch women, Native workers, company guards, saddle tramps, and cooks all leave traces.
Give the clerks cramped store detail and social reach beyond the counter.
Do not include final move names or final move text in this JSON.
generation_prompt.hand_cut_note: The page should make a pencil stub feel sharper than a Bowie knife. A ledger can rob a man without ever raising its voice.
generation_prompt.table_spark: A store scene should ask who owes, who gets refused, what item is missing, and who changed the number in the book.
must_preserve: Use 1899 western store and ledger language only.
Keep debt practical, personal, and playable.
The generated page must include image path cast/images/company-store-clerks.jpg.
No finished page prose, final moves, or final sayings belong in this prompt file.
avoid: do not mention any prior packet, inherited taxonomy, or non-western source language
do not include medieval, enchanted, sacred, or fake-tribal framing
do not make commerce quaint; credit should create pressure
do not use modern slang, modern cash registers, barcodes, vehicles, or clean theme-park staging
self_check: The future markdown follows the exact heading sequence.
The future page is about credit, supply, ledgers, company pressure, and table action.
The prompt contains no finished page prose.
All language belongs to grounded 1899 Jefferson State western play.
